name: United Business Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and cash management services across California, Colorado, Nevada, New Mexico, and Washington.
description_long:
United Business Bank is a regional FDIC-insured bank that serves both personal and business customers across five western states: California, Colorado, Nevada, New Mexico, and Washington. The bank positions itself as particularly focused on labor and business communities, emphasizing expertise in financial protection, savings strategies, and lending solutions tailored to these segments.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of products including personal checking and savings accounts, business checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), individual retirement accounts (IRAs), health savings accounts, and various loan products. For business customers, they provide SBA 7(a) and 504 loans, equipment financing, commercial real estate loans, construction loans, and business lines of credit. Their cash management services include ACH services, wire transfers, remote deposit, merchant card processing, lockbox services, and positive pay. Personal customers can access mobile banking, online bill pay, debit cards, and statewide ATMs.

United Business Bank distinguishes itself through specialized services for labor unions and business communities, offering a dedicated Labor Services Division. They feature competitive account options like the "U Matter" accounts with rates advertised as high as 3.56% APY, the "U Matter Business Express Loan" program, and Simply Checking accounts with waived monthly maintenance fees for online banking enrollees. The bank emphasizes accessibility, LIVE banking (account opening from anywhere), and mobile banking capabilities.

As a regional bank, United Business Bank serves a specific geographic footprint rather than operating nationally. While they offer competitive rates and specialized business services, customers outside their five-state service area cannot access their products. The bank's website indicates it is 5-star rated by Bauer and maintains FDIC insurance protection, though specific loan terms, APR ranges, and detailed account fee structures are not fully disclosed on the homepage. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business Checking (multiple tiers including Simply Business Checking and Interest Checking)
Personal Checking (including Exclusive 50 Checking and Personal Interest Checking)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with CDARS option
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and Health Savings Accounts
Equipment Financing and Commercial Real Estate Loans
Business Lines of Credit and Asset-Based Lines of Credit
Business Cash Management (ACH, wire transfers, remote deposit, merchant processing, lockbox, positive pay)
Online and Mobile Banking with bill pay functionality
Business Credit Cards and Letters of Credit
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Offers SBA 7(a) and 504 loans for small business growth
Specialized Labor Services Division for union and labor communities
Competitive savings rates advertised up to 3.56% APY on U Matter accounts
Simply Checking with no monthly maintenance fee when enrolled in online banking and eStatements
Comprehensive business cash management services including ACH, wire transfers, lockbox, and positive pay
Mobile banking and LIVE account opening available from anywhere
Statewide ATM network access for personal customers
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only serves California, Colorado, Nevada, New Mexico, and Washington
Specific APR ranges, loan terms, and complete fee schedules not clearly disclosed on website
No indication of national online banking or remote account opening for out-of-state customers
Regional bank may have less brand recognition compared to national banking competitors

contact.address: 500 Ygnacio Valley Rd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596

best_for: Small business owners seeking SBA-backed financing in western states
Labor union members and business professionals in the bank's service area
Business owners needing comprehensive cash management and commercial lending solutions
Personal customers seeking competitive savings rates and mobile banking convenience
diagnosis: United Business Bank is best for small business owners, labor community members, and personal customers located in California, Colorado, Nevada, New Mexico, or Washington seeking FDIC-insured banking with competitive rates and specialized business lending. The main caveat is geographic limitation—the bank does not serve customers outside its five-state region, and detailed fee and rate information requires direct contact or account opening.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 500 Ygnacio Valley Rd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
meta_description: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and cash management across California, Colorado, and more.
